reviews.comment:
Estación de servicio, siempre se pie de mejorar, más en un lugar turístico como es Humahuaca

(Translated by Google)
Service stations always have room for improvement, especially in a tourist destination like Humahuaca.

reviews.comment:
Solo combustible, nada más.
Ni agua caliente

(Translated by Google)
Just fuel, nothing else. Not even hot water.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13734748019616020928/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURVdWEzSXFRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Hay muchas filas en el lugar debido a que en el norte de Jujuy hay pocas estaciones de servicios.. a tener en cuenta esto si andan en autos

(Translated by Google)
There are long lines at the station because there are few gas stations in northern Jujuy... keep this in mind if you're driving.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13734748019616020928/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURVbk5HOXpBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Tiene onda pero en temporada podés esperar más de una hora para cargar combustible

(Translated by Google)
It's cool, but during peak season you can wait more than an hour to refuel.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13734748019616020928/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNVMjVyRzJBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Si quieres descansar asta q te atiendas son especiales sentirás q el tiempo se detiene en huamhuaca nadie tiene apuro

(Translated by Google)
If you want to rest until you are taken care of, they are special; you will feel that time stops in Huamhuaca, nobody is in a hurry.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13734748019616020928/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNVMjd5ZXR3RRAB
